name: loomex
description: Run durable Loomex workflows against local workspaces from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run durable workflows on local workspaces.
interface.longDescription: Browse and run Loomex workflows from Codex, operate on explicitly bound local workspaces, follow long-running executions, and answer human requests and approvals. The bundled adapter connects Codex to a durable per-user Loomex Runner service, while the Tauri app remains available as an alternative client.
defaultPrompt: Run a Loomex workflow in this workspace.
